name: testChangePasswordValidationMessages
description: Check password policy validation error messages when changing password in user menu
descriptionHtml: Check password policy validation error messages when changing password in user menu

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'ADMIN'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

steps.name: Press 'User menu' button
Press 'Profile Settings' button
Enter new password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Repeat Password' field
Press 'Save' button
Verify: error message for missing lowercase
Enter new password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Repeat Password' field
Press 'Save' button
Verify: error message for missing uppercase
Enter new password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Repeat Password' field
Press 'Save' button
Verify: error message for missing numeric
Enter new password in the 'Password' field
Enter new password in the 'Repeat Password' field
Press 'Save' button
Verify: error message for missing symbol
